name: Curried Oysters with Banana Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 ripe Red Bananas (diced into ¼-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the best curry powder available and the freshest ingredients.
2. Cut the red bananas into ¼-inch dice.
3. Prepare the Banana Salsa by mixing all ingredients until well blended.
4. In a heavy skillet, sauté the curry powder in melted butter until fragrant.
5. Stir in the shallots and garlic; add the fish fumét. Reduce mixture to about
¼ cup remaining.
6. Whisk in the cream and reduce further until slightly thickened.
7. Add lime juice and salt to taste.
8. Broil or grill oysters over pecan or mesquite until they open.
9. Remove top shell, pour curry sauce over oysters, and top with Banana Salsa.
10. Serve immediately.
FISH FUMÉT:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan; bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat, simmer for 40 minutes, then let cool for another 30 minutes.
3. Strain the liquid before using.
Note: This recipe is adapted from The Coyote Cafe Cookbook by Mark Miller.
